keyword: pet camera with sd card local storage 128gb
title: Pet Camera With SD Card (Local 128GB Storage)
meta: Pet cameras that record straight to a microSD card — no cloud, no fees.
intro: A microSD slot turns a cheap camera into a fee-free recorder. We cover capacity, loop recording and card class.

sections.body: Use a high-endurance card (Video Monitoring rated) to survive constant writes.
When full, the camera overwrites oldest clips — set retention to your need.
At 1080p, ~128GB holds several days of motion-only clips.

faq.a: Yes, app push alerts are free; only remote clip history may need the card.
